bosses.name: Firebreather
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM (boss-colored chat). Firebreather is the BUILT Flaming Hearth fire-dragon Lord (0x8f80) — which I shipped TAUNT-LESS. This gives it a real taunt: 'Your courage softens me...' (a mercy/respect line). NOTE: a near-identical 'your courage softens me. I could grant you a...' was earlier attributed to the Gravedigger (disc_TwilightNecropolis) — the line may be SHARED across bosses, or my Gravedigger attribution needs review.
